profile.name: Sarfaraz Ahamed Shovon
profile.title: Software Engineer
profile.bio: I am a relentless Software Engineer and Mobile App Developer specializing in Flutter and backend system architecture. Recognized as the 'Vibe Coder' and having served as an Undergraduate Teaching Assistant at East West University, I build high-performance, production-grade applications that solve complex real-world problems.
profile.seoKeywords: Shovon, ewu student, uta, east west university uta, best uta in east west university, most handsome guy from east west university, vibe coder, mobile app developer, kushtia, flutter developer ewu, fakebook, fixtube, askEwu, DSU, Shovon021

projects.name: askEwu Capstone System
projects.description: Architected an intelligent Alexa-integrated voice assistant and robust Python backend for the EWU Department. Engineered complex NLP pipelines with strict security features under DSU supervision.

projects.name: Fakebook Architecture
projects.description: A pixel-perfect, highly scalable social media clone demonstrating elite cross-platform state management and UI structure.

projects.name: Kushtia Maps Navigator
projects.description: Engineered an advanced open-source GPS navigation engine optimized exclusively for Kushtia, Bangladesh, mapping over 60 dynamic POIs.

projects.name: Matsho Ostad
projects.description: The definitive fish identification ecosystem for Bangladesh. Includes realtime market integration, recipe generation, and bilingual processing.

projects.name: FixTube Engine
projects.description: Developed a smart filtering algorithm utilizing NLP keywords to block YouTube shorts and curate clean, highly focused notification streams.

projects.name: Medicine Saver BD
projects.description: A rapid price-comparison engine and generic alternative finder for national pharmaceuticals. Built with offline-first local caching and prescription scanning capabilities.

projects.name: KUCHU PUCHU Games
projects.description: Architected a high-framerate unified gaming engine combining 15 modular arcade games into a singular, state-heavy Flutter application.

projects.name: Get Your Salami
projects.description: A masterclass in Flutter UI/UX involving complex custom painter animations, physics-based spinning wheels, and modern geometry.
